headings: Section 35. Default; Termination; Termination for Convenience.
text: Section  50. Entire  Agreement  and  Disclaimer  of  Reliance.  This  Subcontract  and  the  Contract  Documents insofar  as  they  relate  in  any  part  or  any  way  to  this  Subcontract  or  the  Subcontract  Work,  constitute  the  entire agreement between parties hereto. All prior negotiations, proposals, bids, orders, discussions, express or implied representations,  and  any  other  communications  are  superseded  by  this  Subcontract  and  the  Contract  Documents and, to the extent that they are agreed upon, they are incorporated and memorialized herein to the satisfaction of both  parties.  There  are  no  other  understandings,  agreements,  or  express  or  implied  representations  that  are  not contained within the Contract Documents. Accordingly, in deciding to enter into the Contract Documents, neither party is relying on any representations, whether oral or written, relating in any manner to the effect, enforceability or meaning of the Contract Documents or to the duties and obligations created by the Contract Documents, except as specifically set forth therein.
